name: Maplebear Inc.
summary: Maplebear Inc. (Instacart) is a technology and enablement partner for the grocery industry. It operates Instacart Marketplace, connecting customers to over 2,200 retail banners for delivery and pickup; Instacart Enterprise Platform, powering retailers' e-commerce, fulfillment, and in-store technologies; and Instacart Ads, an advertising platform serving over 9,000 active brands using first-party transaction data. Since founding, Instacart has powered more than 1.6 billion orders and reaches over 98% of North American households.
